mapper.select:
SELECT course_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM (
-- 报名 SELECT course_id, 5 AS score FROM course_enrollment WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UNION ALL
-- 学习完成比例 SELECT c.course_id, 4 * ( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lp.is_completed = 1 THEN c.id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT c.id),0) ) AS score FROM course_chapter c LEFT JOIN learning_progress lp ON lp.chapter_id = c.id AND lp.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY c.course_id
UNION ALL
-- 收藏 SELECT course_id, 3 AS score FROM course_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UNION ALL
-- 点赞 SELECT course_id, 2 AS score FROM course_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
) t GROUP BY course_id HAVING course_id IS NOT NULL AND total_score > 0

SELECT user_id, course_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM ( SELECT user_id, course_id, 5 AS score FROM course_enrollment
UNION ALL
SELECT lp.user_id, c.course_id, 4 * ( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lp.is_completed = 1 THEN lp.chapter_id END) / NULLIF(cc.total_chapters,0) ) AS score FROM learning_progress lp JOIN course_chapter c ON lp.chapter_id = c.id JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS total_chapters FROM course_chapter GROUP BY course_id ) cc ON cc.course_id = c.course_id GROUP BY lp.user_id, c.course_id
UNION ALL
SELECT user_id, course_id, 3 AS score FROM course_favorite WHERE is_deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT user_id, course_id, 2 AS score FROM course_like WHERE is_deleted = 0 ) t GROUP BY user_id, course_id
